name: decentralized-trust-platform
description: Decentralized Enterprise Trust Platform - A next-generation DID-based authentication and authorization system

scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,PORTAL" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix portal run preview"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,PORTAL" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix portal run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,PORTAL,WALLET" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix portal run dev" "cd wallet && npx expo start"
scripts.dev:lan: npm run sync:network && concurrently --names "BACKEND,PORTAL,WALLET" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix portal run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "npm --prefix wallet run start -- --lan --port 8082"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix portal run build && npm --prefix circuits run compile
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix circuits run test
scripts.clean: npm --prefix backend run clean && npm --prefix portal run clean 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix portal install
scripts.setup:full: npm run setup && npm --prefix contracts install && npm --prefix contracts run compile && npm --prefix circuits install
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'No lint script in backend' && npm --prefix portal run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'No lint script in portal'

author: DecentralizedTrustPlatform Team
